query:
-- فحص NAS الحالي
SELECT id, ownerId, nasname, shortname, secret, type, status, provisioningStatus, allocatedIp, createdAt 
FROM nas 
ORDER BY id;

-- فحص VPN connections
SELECT id, nasId, connectionType, status, localVpnIp, serverIp, createdAt 
FROM vpn_connections 
ORDER BY id;

-- فحص عدد pending NAS
SELECT COUNT(*) as pending_count 
FROM nas 
WHERE provisioningStatus = 'pending';
